cycles.fix_applied: PR #32: paths filter on deploy.yml (runtime code only: src/, bot2/, start.py, requirements, config.py) + workflow_dispatch. Non-runtime merges now flow via 2h timer without restart. The stale-list anomaly from cycles 4-5 was a SYMPTOM of the restart loop, not a dashboard bug.

cycles.lesson: BATCH merges; avoid touching src/ unless intended to restart the bot.
